Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Consultants]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Consultants are a group that can be hired for advice or business assistance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Consultants are a group that includes Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Consultants do not work on their own.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — The Consultants run a comfortable prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Urzaia fought with the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Consultants would prefer to have no Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Consultants view a world of anarchy as a haven for spies and assassins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Consultants are a group that may work under the influence of the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — The Consultants are enemies of Urzaia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Consultants perform thorough inspections of possessions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — The Consultants have a presence on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Consultants wear black outfits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Consultants do not employ hired killers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Consultants might kill Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — There are three Consultants facing Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — There are three Consultants in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Calder hopes the Handmaiden and the Consultants will kill each other.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — The Consultants are a group that Maxwell believes Shera can compete with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — The Consultants are a group that performed work on Ulrich Fletcher's workshop.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Consultants are a group that Naberius was able to shake with ease.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants had very little information on Jyrine Tessella Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — There are two thousand Consultants living on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Meia was born and raised among Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Consultants are a group that Meia believes in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Consultants gathered on the dock outside Bastion’s Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The Consultants have an order of assassins.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Jyrine was positioned between two Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — The Consultants are a group that wins regardless of which side loses in conflicts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Consultants suffered heavy losses during the mission, with only twenty-four remaining out of sixty-one.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Consultants are a group that Yala is legendary among.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The entrance to Zhen’s House of the Masons is well-known to all Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Consultants were hired by a local governor and mayors to investigate disappearances.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Consultants maintain archives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Consultants have been known to attack Blackwatch operations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The hall was filled with Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Consultants are being forced to betray their cause using the Emperor's crown.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — The Consultants caught up with Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Consultants include Meia and Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Consultants crest is the Gardening Shears.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Cheska mentions Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Consultants are part of the Independent alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Consultants claim to have killed Nakothi’s Handmaiden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Consultants are an Imperial Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Consultants allow Navigators to settle in and deliver payloads of soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Consultants lost a battle.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Gardeners are part of the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Consultants are present on the terrain of the island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Consultants are known as the Empire's most dedicated servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The Consultants are a group that could benefit from Loreli being Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants are allies of the Luminians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Consultants is a group Lucan wishes to press for change in.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Consultants want to speed the Emperor on his way to the grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — The Consultants were preparing for war.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Consultants are individuals whom Benji and others were taught to act like by Maxwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Consultants have private reasons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Consultants vanished along with Yala and the red-suited former prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Consultants are one of three Guilds that elect heads by bonding to a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — The Consultants dropped to one knee and murmured 'Guild Head'.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Consultants had a former headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Consultants are one of the four Independent Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants are one of the Guilds Calder mentions as playing a vital support role.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — The Consultants possess a vast store of strange knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Consultants are suspected of trying to kill Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — The Consultants are rumored to be everywhere and know everything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Consultants were prying the plate from Calder's back using crowbars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Consultants use alchemy during interrogations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Consultants are a group that includes Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — The Consultants are a group that possesses the ship Bastion’s Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — The Consultants are a group that Andel mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Calder does not know where the Consultants are.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Consultants are an exiled group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — The Consultants provide security from the shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Consultants can hear the cry of a winter-feather robin whistle as deafeningly loud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Team leaders are given invested whistles to signal Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Consultants are not true killers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Tens of thousands of people are out-bidding one another to hire Consultants due to the chaos following the Emperor's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants secured exits around the Rose Tower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants are a group that Calder Marten recognizes as a potential threat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Consultants play a vital support role.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Two Consultants flowed through the ordinary Guild members like shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The Consultants have nearly doubled in size over the last two years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Mistress of the Mists saw Shera as a potential Guild Head for the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — Lucan prepared letters for a select few other Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Consultants would be giving up power by raising the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Consultants are sometimes viewed as servants by their clients.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Consultants hid in crates to ambush Lucan and Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Shera had not brought enough Consultants to secure the place.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera wondered how many Consultants had died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera would have to apologize to the Consultants.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
